greeting:
Welcome to ZimSME AI Solutions 👋

We can help with websites, AI automations, business launch support, and app discovery.

Please reply with one of these options:
1. Starter Site
2. Business Site
3. Premium Site
4. AI Quick Win
5. Launch Audit
6. App Discovery

steps.prompt: Great. Which package are you choosing? You can reply with the package name or the number.
What is the name of your business?
In 2–3 sentences, what does your business do, who do you help, and where are you based?
List your main services or products. You can include rough prices if you want.
Who is your ideal customer, and what action do you want visitors to take on the site? (Call, WhatsApp, book, request a quote, visit, etc.)
Please share your WhatsApp number, email, location, and business hours.
Send any business social links or usernames. If you have none, reply NONE.
Tell me your business story: when you started, why you started, and what makes you different.
Now send your logo plus 5 to 10 business images. You can also type your preferred colours or say MATCH THE LOGO. When you are finished sending files, reply DONE.
Send 1 to 3 testimonials or reviews if you have them. If not, reply NONE.
Any special requests, inspiration sites, must-have features, or layout preferences? If none, reply NONE.
